p2p_enrich.notes: Added 2 new pass_to_pass tests with origin: repo_tests: 1) test_ruff_check - runs 'ruff check' on modified Python files, 2) test_ruff_format_check - runs 'ruff format --check' on modified files. Both tests use subprocess.run() to execute real CI commands. Verified they pass at base commit. CI commands tested: ruff check (passes), ruff format --check (passes). Modified files covered: posthog/api/llm_prompt.py, posthog/api/llm_prompt_serializers.py, posthog/api/services/llm_prompt.py. Repo uses pytest for Django tests but requires full database setup which is not feasible in this environment.

validate.notes: Fixed test_outputs.py to inline apply_prompt_edits function instead of importing from posthog which requires Django. Fixed eval_manifest.yaml rubric rule to include reference text and merged rules.
